summary: Completed testing of Iteration 48 - QR Code Permission, Step 4 Content CMS, and Send Invitation Modal CSS Variables. All 10 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified: Create QR Code radio in CMS Members Manager, Business QR section in My Account Invite Code, Send Invitation modal using --ma-* CSS variables, and enrollment form buttons right-aligned.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 48 QR Code Permission and CSS Variables fully tested. CMS Members Manager has 'Create QR Code' Yes/No radio in Membership tab with data-testid='can-create-qr-yes' and 'can-create-qr-no'. My Account Invite Code page shows Business QR section (data-testid='business-qr-section') only if member.can_create_qr is true. Send Invitation modal uses --ma-* CSS variables for theming.

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/members: PASS - Returns members with can_create_qr field
backend_apis.POST /api/member/generate-qr: PASS - Generates QR code with correct URL format

frontend_enrollment_wizard.step_1_form: PASS - No richtext fields on step 1
frontend_enrollment_wizard.buttons_alignment: PASS - Buttons container has justify-end class for right alignment

cms_members_manager.membership_tab: PASS - Contains Create QR Code section
cms_members_manager.helper_text: PASS - Shows 'Allow this member to generate their own QR code from My Account for bulk invitations.'
